step1Desc.message: Ɗauki hoton allo ko bayyana abin da AI ta yi wa mutane.

step3Desc.message: An ɓoye rahotonka a na'uranrka. Kai ne zaka yanke shawara.

voiceRecording.message: 🔴 Rikodi yana gudana… danna Tsaya kika gama

discPrivateDesc.message: Yana a na'urarka kawai. Ba a aika wani wuri.

discAnonDesc.message: An aika ba tare da bayananku ba. Yana taimaka wa masu bincike.

discPartnerDesc.message: An raba shi da ƙungiyar al'umma da aka tabbatar.

confirmDesc.message: Na gode. An karɓi rahotonka lafiya. Asirinka yana lafiya.

privacyNotice.message: 🔒 Babu buƙatar asusu. Babu bayanai na sirri da aka adana.
